stories.title: Every release opens a chapter.
stories.lead: A growing library of melodic & organic house — each record a page in the same evening, caught somewhere between dusk and dream.

authors.title: Every artist writes their own.
authors.lead: The voices behind the label — each one a chapter that keeps unfolding, release after release.

podcasts.title: Every chapter, a new mix.
podcasts.lead: The Magic Stories podcast series — hour-long journeys mixed by the label's artists and friends, new sounds gathered from around the world.

submit.title: Send us your story.
submit.lead: Every release here began as a demo in somebody's inbox. If your music belongs in the evening mist — melodic, organic, patient — we would love to hear it.
submit.rule1Body: Finished, or close to it. Private SoundCloud links work best — please, no attachments or zips.
submit.rule2Body: Who you are, where your sound comes from, and one link to wherever you live online.
submit.rule3Body: We listen for melodic and organic house with a heart — music that paints a place we haven't been yet.
submit.footnote: We listen to everything that arrives. If your story resonates with ours, we'll write back — it can take a little while, and silence never means your music wasn't heard.

library.title: The Magic Library
library.lead: The community's shared chapter — posts, links and conversation. Drop a track from YouTube, SoundCloud or X and tell your story.
library.empty: The Library is still empty. Write the first chapter.

account.leadIn: Set your name and avatar — this is how others will see you in the Library.
account.leadOut: Sign in with your Google account to write chapters, like and reply.
